_description: Skill rank benefits from PHB Chapter 4. Each skill lists what you gain at specific ranks.

Melee Weapons.broad: Training with close-combat weapons. Enables parry.

rank_benefits.benefit: Double-Strike: Make two attacks in one action at +1 penalty each.
Improved Parry: -1 step bonus when parrying.
Devastating Strike: +1 damage step on Amazing hits.

Powered weapon.base: Proficiency with gravmaces, stun batons, tri-staffs.

rank_benefits.benefit: Double-Strike: Make two attacks in one action at +1 penalty each.
Improved Parry: -1 step bonus when parrying.

Knowledge.broad: General knowledge, computer use, deduction, first aid, languages.

First aid.base: Treat injuries. O: stabilize, G: heal 1 wound, A: heal 2 wounds.

Computer operation.base: Use computers, access data, run programs.

Unarmed Attack.broad: Untrained fighting. Punch: d4s/d4+1s/d4+2s. Overpowering attempts at +1 penalty.

Brawl.base: Street fighting, boxing, wrestling. Uses unarmed damage table.

rank_benefits.benefit: Improved Damage: Damage becomes d4+1s/d4+2s/d4+3s.
Knockout Blow: On Amazing, target must make CON check or be stunned 1 round.
Double-Strike: Two unarmed attacks at +1 penalty each.

Power martial arts.base: Karate, tae kwon do. Damage: d6s/d6+2s/d4w.

rank_benefits.benefit: Improved STR Resistance: +1 step to your STR resistance modifier.
Increased Damage: d8s/d8+2s/d6w.
Double-Strike: Two attacks at +1 penalty each.
Devastating Damage: d8+2s/d8+4s/d8w.

Mind shield.base: Defense vs psionic attacks. O: +1, G: +2, A: +3 penalty to attacker.

Illusion.base: Project false sight/sound into target's mind. Range 5m/rank.

Suggest.base: Plant a thought. Duration: 1/2/3 hours by degree.

Contact.base: Establish mental link. O: simple concepts, G: moderate discussion, A: full conversation.

rank_benefits.benefit: Increased Damage: d4+2s/d6+2s/d8+2s.
Devastating Damage: 2d4+2s/2d6+2s/2d8+2s.

Heavy Weapons.broad: Heavy ranged weapons: machine guns, rocket launchers.

rank_benefits.benefit: Improved Aim: -1 bonus to situation die.
Burst Control: -1 step penalty on burst fire (normally +1).
Precision: Reduce scatter by one row on miss.

Surgery.base: Perform surgery. Required for cyber installation.

rank_benefits.benefit: -1 step bonus to surgery checks.
Can attempt experimental procedures.

Levitate.base: Lift objects or self. Weight limit based on WIL.

rank_benefits.benefit: Increased Damage: +1 damage step.
Devastating: +2 damage steps.

Kinetic shield.base: Deflect physical attacks. Provides armor-like protection.

Acrobatics.broad: Tumbling, balance, dodging. Fall damage reduction.

Dodge.base: Active defense against ranged attacks. Costs one action.

rank_benefits.benefit: Reaction Dodge: Can dodge as a reaction, not just on your action.
Improved Dodge: -1 step bonus to dodge attempts.

Movie stunts.base: Acrobatic combat maneuvers and cinematic feats.

Zero-G training.base: Reduces zero-g penalty from +3 to +2. Eliminates light gravity penalty.

rank_benefits.benefit: Zero-g penalty reduced to +1. Light gravity: -1 bonus.
Zero-g penalty eliminated.
Zero-g: -1 step bonus to physical actions.
Speed Repair: Halve repair time.
Can attempt Ordinary difficulty inventions.
Can attempt Good difficulty inventions.
Can attempt Amazing difficulty inventions.

Precognition.base: Glimpse probable future events. GM provides cryptic hints.

Psychometry.base: Read history of objects through touch.

Intuition.base: Gut feelings, sense danger, read situations.

Perception.base: Notice details, spot hidden things, hear sounds.

Modern Ranged Weapons.broad: Pistols, rifles, SMGs of all types.

rank_benefits.benefit: Quick Draw: Draw and fire with no penalty.
Double-Shot: Fire twice at +1 penalty each.
Distance Precision: -1 bonus at medium range.
Rate of Fire Increase: Three shots at +2 penalty each.
Improved Aim: -1 bonus to all rifle attacks.
Precision Fire: -1 additional bonus when using aimed shot.
Distance Precision: -1 bonus at long range.
Double-Shot: Fire twice at +1 penalty each.
Burst Control: Reduce autofire penalty by 1 step.
Double-Shot: Fire twice at +1 penalty each.

Mental resolve.base: Resist psionic attacks, fear, mental compulsion.

Physical resolve.base: Resist pain, stay conscious, endure hardship.

Heal.base: Mend wounds psionically. O: 1 wound, G: 2, A: 1 mortal.

Stealth.broad: Hide, sneak, shadow. Success provides penalty to observer's detection.

Shadow.base: Follow a target without being noticed.

rank_benefits.benefit: Increased Effect: +1 additional step penalty to observer per rank above 2.

Hide.base: Stay unnoticed using cover, darkness, stillness.

rank_benefits.benefit: Increased Effect: +1 additional step penalty to observer per rank above 2.
Increased Effect: +1 additional step penalty to observer per rank above 2.

Interaction.broad: Social skills. Can be used as encounter skill to shift NPC attitudes.

Command.base: Direct allies in combat. Provide action check bonus.

Athletics.broad: General physical prowess. Jumping, climbing, throwing, swimming.

Throw.base: Throw objects accurately. Range based on STR.

rank_benefits.benefit: Distance Precision: -1 step bonus at medium range.
Improved Range: Increase all throw ranges by 50%.
Power Throw: +1 damage die step on thrown weapons.

Jump.base: Standing jump 1m/2m/3m (O/G/A). Running jump 2m/4m/6m. Vertical leap 1m/1.5m/2m.

Stamina.broad: Physical endurance, resist pain, survival basics.

Endurance.base: Sustained physical activity. Extended travel checks every 4/3/2 hours.

Resist pain.base: Ignore wound penalties. O: ignore 1 step, G: 2, A: 3.
